1885660929.title: [SG ONLY Award-Winning Lancet] - 1.5mm
1885660929.detail_text: Specifications BrandSAFETiCET™SKU1885660929_SGAMZ-10051904791Pack TypeSingle ItemHealth Accessory TypeMedical Devices What’s in the box 1*[SG ONLY Award-Winning Lancet] - 1.5mm Highlights Using cutting edge research and technology, the SAFETiCET™ team developed a single-use, contact-activated safety lancet that was designed and built with patients, care givers and buyers in mind. SAFETiCET™ is a state-of-the-art capillary blood sampling device that boasts as one of the sleekest in design and smallest in the world. SAFETiCET™ is a uniquely-designed lancet that has won 8 awards for outstanding achievement, including the prestigious Singapore President’s Design Award in 2016. It was also voted least painful lancet by participants at two American Diabetes Association Expos in 2012 and 2013. For accurate blood sample size SAFETiCET comes in four sizes for different blood volume needs: Micro, low, medium, and high. Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here

3124920779.title: Automatic Choking Rescue Device for Kids and Adults Portable Anti Choking Device Strong Suction Home Emergency Kit Heimlich Mane
3124920779.detail_text: "Instructions： This is a First Aid Anti Choking Emergency Device, Semi-automatic anti choking device, Auto CPR First Aid Choking Device Outdoor Home Choking Emergency Equipment Adults Children Breath Rescue Anti Suffocation Device It is a Household Essentials,Even may not be used every day like daily items, but it is a pioneer in first aid at a critical time, adding a ray of hope for rescue. For families with children and Older, emergency breathing apparatus is a must, because the choking rate of children and older is much higher than that of adults. Feature: •Easy to Operate: Quickly release danger with only one button trigger in emergency while supporting self-rescue,Semi-automatic anti choking device: one-button trigger system makes it extremely easy to use •Preloading: Make the rescue quicker and easier, saving valuable time in emergency situations • First Aid Portable: Make rescue faster and easier, saving valuable time in emergency situations. With just one press of a button, our anti-choking device quickly work, saving valuable time in emergency situations • Consistent pressure: Continuous Suction of Approximately 35KPa, provides immediate pressure, relieves suffocation and ensures the best results every time. Safety: Greatly reduce the damage caused by mask pressure to face and neck, eliminating the risk of secondary damage caused by the blockage going deeper. 3 Different Size Masks: Cover almost all people except infants. Make sure the mask fits the face and forms a vacuum environment • How to Use: Ensure that the mask fits the face, forming a vacuum environment, press the button, the suction generated by the mask will quickly relieve suffocation. • Using with high quality materials to ensure the device's durability and reliability Technical Specification: Stable Suction Power:35 KPa Instantaneous pumping rate ≥0.3 L/min No Potential Risks：Unlike Heimlich, this requires no manual force to ribs Physical Identity： Product Size：15*8*7cm Product Weight：0.35kg Package Size：23.8*20.5*10cm Package Weight:1kg Package included: 1XAnti Choking Rescue Device 3X Masks 1X User Manual " "Instructions： This is a First Aid Anti Choking Emergency Device, Semi-automatic anti choking device, Auto CPR First Aid Choking Device Outdoor Home Choking Emergency Equipment Adults Children Breath Rescue Anti Suffocation Device It is a Household Essentials,Even may not be used every day like daily items, but it is a pioneer in first aid at a critical time, adding a ray of hope for rescue. 3124920779.detail_html:
"Instructions：

This is a First Aid Anti Choking Emergency Device, Semi-automatic anti choking device,

Auto CPR First Aid Choking Device Outdoor Home Choking Emergency Equipment Adults Children Breath Rescue Anti Suffocation Device

It is a Household Essentials,Even may not be used every day like daily items, but it is a pioneer in first aid at a critical time, adding a ray of hope for rescue. For families with children and Older, emergency breathing apparatus is a must, because the choking rate of children and older is much higher than that of adults.

Feature:

•Easy to Operate: Quickly release danger with only one button trigger in emergency while supporting self-rescue,Semi-automatic anti choking device: one-button trigger system makes it extremely easy to use

•Preloading: Make the rescue quicker and easier, saving valuable time in emergency situations

• First Aid Portable: Make rescue faster and easier, saving valuable time in emergency situations. With just one press of a button, our anti-choking device quickly work, saving valuable time in emergency situations

• Consistent pressure: Continuous Suction of Approximately 35KPa, provides immediate pressure, relieves suffocation and ensures the best results every time.

Safety: Greatly reduce the damage caused by mask pressure to face and neck, eliminating the risk of secondary damage caused by the blockage going deeper.

3 Different Size Masks: Cover almost all people except infants. Make sure the mask fits the face and forms a vacuum environment

• How to Use: Ensure that the mask fits the face, forming a vacuum environment, press the button, the suction generated by the mask will quickly relieve suffocation.

• Using with high quality materials to ensure the device's durability and reliability

Technical Specification:

Stable Suction Power:35 KPa

Instantaneous pumping rate ≥0.3 L/min

No Potential Risks：Unlike Heimlich, this requires no manual force to ribs

Physical Identity：

Product Size：15*8*7cm

Product Weight：0.35kg

Package Size：23.8*20.5*10cm

Package Weight:1kg

Package included:

1XAnti Choking Rescue Device

3X Masks

1X User Manual "

aiTexts: This Automatic Choking Rescue Device is essential for emergency situations involving choking for both kids and adults.
Features: Semi-automatic design with a one-button trigger for easy operation.
Safety: Provides consistent suction power (30-40 KPa) without manual force, reducing potential risks.
Versatility: Includes three different mask sizes, suitable for individuals aged 1 and up.
Practical Use: A must-have for families, offering peace of mind during critical moments.
Durability: Made with high-quality materials for reliable performance.

product.desc:
• Please note: For the blue style, the product list does not include toe training straps and spare straps.
  • Easier operation, stronger traction!

Toe corrector, new upgrade. Help repair hallux valgus, overlapping toes, hammer toes, crooked toes and other foot problems. At the same time, the bunion corrector big toe straightener is more powerful and could also used for moderate or severe bunion.
product.highlights:
• 【New Bone Setting Concept】 Toe straightener are specially equipped with 3 different angle fixing plate for users could meet the needs of bone setting in different periods. A 15°fixation plate applies to the severe stage, a 7.5°fixation plate applies to the moderate stage, and a 0°fixation plate applies to the mild stage.
  • 【Creative Knob Design】Bunion corrector adoptsa texture button design. The scale adjustment could accurately correct the angle, which could be loose or tight, increasing traction and improving comfort.
  • 【Professional Materials】 The bunion corrector made of high-quality materials could minimize hallux valgus. Soft silicone inner cushion could be reused and cleaned easily.
  • 【One Size】Suitable for all sizes, both men's and women's, providing a comfortable fit.
  • 【Carefully selected 7-piece set】 Including toe corrector*1, 0°fixing plate*1, 15°fixing plate*1, backup correction belt*1, storage bag*1, and exercise belt*1. Train your toes for flexibility and speed up your recovery.
  • Please note: For the blue style, the product list does not include toe training straps and spare straps.

1011772826.title: Medium CarbonQuad with Essential Handle (Agegracefully Carbon Fibre Smart Quad with Rechargeable LED Touch Light and Manual Alarm) #WS54
1011772826.detail_text: 1. 10 adjustable steps for users range from 1.4m to 1.8m. [5.6ft to 5.9ft]. 2. Patients suffering from hip or leg injuries typically use a quad cane to support them. They will need a walking stick with a smaller tip as they journey through their recovery process. The interchangeable base enables the user to replace the quad base/tip instead of purchasing a new walking aid to suit their condition. 3. The Medium Quad Base has an enlarged surface area for extra stability. The tubing insert is offset to the sides to keep the user close, and the low-profile design eliminates accidental tripping. 4. The Anti-Slip Self-Standing tip provides excellent traction on flat surfaces. The soft pivoting joint encourages natural walking motion and reduces stress on the elbow. 5. Carbon fibre makes exceptionally light and robust tubing, reducing weight and enabling better handling, especially for frail older adults. 6. Designed to ensure that the walking stick will not obstruct the user when breaking a fall. Upon sudden excessive force being applied to the wrist cord, it will automatically be detached, thus reducing the chance of the walking stick obstructing the user. The lace buckle on the wrist cord allows for customisation to the wrist size.
1011772826.detail_html:
1. 10 adjustable steps for users range from 1.4m to 1.8m. [5.6ft to 5.9ft].

2. Patients suffering from hip or leg injuries typically use a quad cane to support them. They will need a walking stick with a smaller tip as they journey through their recovery process. The interchangeable base enables the user to replace the quad base/tip instead of purchasing a new walking aid to suit their condition.

3. The Medium Quad Base has an enlarged surface area for extra stability. The tubing insert is offset to the sides to keep the user close, and the low-profile design eliminates accidental tripping.

4. The Anti-Slip Self-Standing tip provides excellent traction on flat surfaces. The soft pivoting joint encourages natural walking motion and reduces stress on the elbow.

5. Carbon fibre makes exceptionally light and robust tubing, reducing weight and enabling better handling, especially for frail older adults.

6. Designed to ensure that the walking stick will not obstruct the user when breaking a fall. Upon sudden excessive force being applied to the wrist cord, it will automatically be detached, thus reducing the chance of the walking stick obstructing the user.

The lace buckle on the wrist cord allows for customisation to the wrist size.

product.highlights:
KEY FEATURES:

 

Handle:

  • An LED torchlight with a 4-step angle adjustability feature
  • Safety Red Flashing Lights
  • Manual Fall-Alarm
  • Build-in Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery

 

Body:

2974379056.detail_text: Introduction: PM10 Portable ECG Monitor is a device for checking ECG,which is applicable for family and individual user, it is a good helper to early prevent from cardiovascular diseases and reduce risks. Intelligent design, achieves remote health management by using with mobile application, it can automatically start measurement, store ECG, upload data, download health conclusion and obtain doctor advice at the first moment. Features: 1.77" color TFT-LCD. Quickly to check ECG once finger touching, convenient to operate. Accurate conclusion can be obtained immediately after measuring. The built-in rechargeable lithium battery can continuously record for up to 500 cases in full charging. Bluetooth transmission. ECG data can be saved to CLOUD Platform permanently, convenient to check and analyze. Historical data can be printed at any time, convenient to diagnose. 2974379056.detail_html:
Introduction:

PM10 Portable ECG Monitor is a device for checking ECG,which is applicable for family and individual user, it is a good helper to early prevent from cardiovascular diseases and reduce risks. Intelligent design, achieves remote health management by using with mobile application, it can automatically start measurement, store ECG, upload data, download health conclusion and obtain doctor advice at the first moment.

Features:

1.77" color TFT-LCD. Quickly to check ECG once finger touching, convenient to operate. Accurate conclusion can be obtained immediately after measuring. The built-in rechargeable lithium battery can continuously record for up to 500 cases in full charging. Bluetooth transmission. ECG data can be saved to CLOUD Platform permanently, convenient to check and analyze. Historical data can be printed at any time, convenient to diagnose.

Performance:

Calibration voltage：1mV±5% Standard sensitivity：10mm/mV±5% Amplitude frequency characteristic： standard: 10Hz，1Hz～20Hz；(+0.4dB，-3dB) Noise level：≤30μV CMRR：≥60dB Scanning speed：25mm/s±5% Sampling rate：250 dots/s HR measurement range：30bpm～300bpm，error： ±1bpm or 1% Type of protection against electric shock: Internal power device Degree of protection against electric shock: Type BF applied part Degree of waterproof: IP22

Physical characteristic:

Dimension: 100mm(L)×45mm(W)×15mm(H) Weight: 60g

Package included:

1XPM10 ECG EKG Machine Heart Beat Monitor 1XPower cord, 1XUser manual 1XPaper Pack Box

Payment

1.We accept alipay and paypal here. 2.All major credit cards &paypal are accepted through secure payment processor ESCROW. PLEASE NOTE: S&H DOES NOT INCLUDE DUTIES, LOCATL TAXES OR ANY OTHER IMPORTATION FEES. We are not responsible for any buyer's location custom duty or import tax.

Shipping

1. Items will be shipped within 1-5 business days after we verify your payment. 2. We provide Tracking Code for all transactions, it will be added to sale records after sending out. 3. Please tell me your current address after your payment within 24 hours; otherwise, we will ship your item based on your Aliexpress address, so make sure it is correct.

Warranty:

1. One Year Manufacturer's Warranty for defective items (excluding items damaged and/or misused after receipt). Accessories come with a 6-month warranty. 2.If buyer requests a return when there is no quality problem of the item he received,return postage has to be paid by buyer,and postage for the item won't be returned. 3.If item is damaged or defective on arrival,buyer can either requests a refund or replacement,and postage will be paid by us,meanwhile,the item must be returned. Note: A. Customs duties is neither included in the item value nor the postage,which should be in the responsibility of buyers. B. Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding/buying.

Return/Refund

1. You have 7 days to contact us and 10 days to return it from the date it was received.WE WILL ISSUE YOU A REFUND OR REPLACEMENT! 2. All returned items MUST BEin the original packagingand you MUST PROVIDE us with the shipping tracking number, specific reason for the return, and your eBay ID. 3. We will refund your full winning big amount, upon receipt of the item in its original condition and packaging with all components and accessories included, after both Buyer and Seller cancel the transaction from eBay. aiTexts: This Contec PM10 EKG Monitor is a portable ECG machine designed for home care.
Display: 1.77" color screen for easy reading of heart data.
Functionality: Handheld heart beat recorder with USB and Bluetooth connectivity for seamless data transfer.
Usage: Ideal for monitoring heart health at home or on the go.
Software: Comes with PC software for detailed analysis and record-keeping.
Durability: Compact design ensures convenience and reliability for everyday use.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
Introduction:

PM10 Portable ECG Monitor is a device for checking ECG,which is applicable for family and individual user, it is a good helper to early prevent from cardiovascular diseases and reduce risks. Intelligent design, achieves remote health management by using with mobile application, it can automatically start measurement, store ECG, upload data, download health conclusion and obtain doctor advice at the first moment.

Features:

1.77" color TFT-LCD. Quickly to check ECG once finger touching, convenient to operate. Accurate conclusion can be obtained immediately after measuring. The built-in rechargeable lithium battery can continuously record for up to 500 cases in full charging. Bluetooth transmission. ECG data can be saved to CLOUD Platform permanently, convenient to check and analyze. Historical data can be printed at any time, convenient to diagnose.

Performance:

Calibration voltage：1mV±5% Standard sensitivity：10mm/mV±5% Amplitude frequency characteristic： standard: 10Hz，1Hz～20Hz；(+0.4dB，-3dB) Noise level：≤30μV CMRR：≥60dB Scanning speed：25mm/s±5% Sampling rate：250 dots/s HR measurement range：30bpm～300bpm，error： ±1bpm or 1% Type of protection against electric shock: Internal power device Degree of protection against electric shock: Type BF applied part Degree of waterproof: IP22

Physical characteristic:

Dimension: 100mm(L)×45mm(W)×15mm(H) Weight: 60g

Package included:

1XPM10 ECG EKG Machine Heart Beat Monitor 1XPower cord, 1XUser manual 1XPaper Pack Box

Payment

1.We accept alipay and paypal here. 2.All major credit cards &paypal are accepted through secure payment processor ESCROW. Import duties, taxes and charges are not included in the item price or shipping charges. These charges are the buyer's responsibility. Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding/buying. 3.S&H will be determined based upon the SHIP TO address,Tax and customs.Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or postage cost. These charges are the buyer's responsibility. Avoiding some unnecessary trouble, please check with your country's customs office to inform us what we should declare its value before shipping. PLEASE NOTE: S&H DOES NOT INCLUDE DUTIES, LOCATL TAXES OR ANY OTHER IMPORTATION FEES. We are not responsible for any buyer's location custom duty or import tax.

Shipping

1. Items will be shipped within 1-5 business days after we verify your payment. 2. We provide Tracking Code for all transactions, it will be added to sale records after sending out. 3. Please tell me your current address after your payment within 24 hours; otherwise, we will ship your item based on your Aliexpress address, so make sure it is correct.

Warranty:

1. One Year Manufacturer's Warranty for defective items (excluding items damaged and/or misused after receipt). Accessories come with a 6-month warranty. 2.If buyer requests a return when there is no quality problem of the item he received,return postage has to be paid by buyer,and postage for the item won't be returned. 3.If item is damaged or defective on arrival,buyer can either requests a refund or replacement,and postage will be paid by us,meanwhile,the item must be returned. Note: A. Customs duties is neither included in the item value nor the postage,which should be in the responsibility of buyers. B. Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding/buying.

Return/Refund

1. You have 7 days to contact us and 10 days to return it from the date it was received.WE WILL ISSUE YOU A REFUND OR REPLACEMENT! 2. All returned items MUST BEin the original packagingand you MUST PROVIDE us with the shipping tracking number, specific reason for the return, and your eBay ID. 3. product.desc:
Product information

Product name：Medical aseptic application

Model/specification：Washing cotton type

Structure and composition：consisting of nonwovens (or plastic films), pressure-sensitive adhesive,Release paper, dressing block composition.

Scope of application：suitable for dressing surgical wounds and various external wounds.


Note：

1. View product identifiers such as "1-sexual use" "sterilized"before use；

2.Packing damage, air leakage, moisture, discoloration, expiration and so on shall not be used.

Sterilization method：sterilized with ethylene oxide

Effective period：2 years
product.highlights:
• Suitable for truma application, wound after surgery, belly stick, infusion fixation
  • Ethylene oxide,sterile process sterilization, safe to use
  • Breathable skin-friendly, needles-pouched non-woven,Soft mesh,care for baby belly
  • Absorbent pad,no glue residue,soft and comfortable
  • Microporous base fabric, remove sweat and reduce wound infection
  • complete removal without residue,reduce pain
  • Individual package , peace of mind

product.desc: Tech Love Fabric Flexible Toe Bunion Corrector, fully upgraded, adds more comfort, but also provides strong support for your toes. Correct your toes properly and don't let severe foot pain hinder your daily comfort.
product.highlights:
• Quantity: 1pair, free size, basically suitable for everyone.
  • The cloth containing copper ions is used as the lining, which is effective antibacterial, lightweight and breathable, washable, non-irritating, clean and sanitary, providing a good environment for toe correction.
  • 2 aluminum strips at different angles, removable. Aluminum rods are used at different stages for better correction to meet the correction needs of different people.
  • Removable heel strap, and with built-in strap, elastic, double non-slip, easy to walk.
  • It is adjustable, stretchable, Velcro paste design, magic hair can be pasted more than 500 times, very strong, flexible use.
  • Suitable for multi-scene use, can be worn in slippers, can also be used at night when sleeping. Note: Early wear, if uncomfortable, you can take off the aluminum strip.

424606874.title: [BUNDLE OF 5] Dr. Wong Pain Relieving Plaster 膏药贴 (10pcs/Pack) – Muscle Aches and Strains / Knee Pain & Back Pain
424606874.detail_text: Dr. Wong Pain Relieving Plaster 膏药贴 (10pcs/Pack) For Muscle Aches, Knee & Back Pain 【Suitable for / 适用症状】 Muscle aches and strains, arthritic aches, bruises, sprains, and traumatic injuries. 肌肉酸痛、关节炎酸痛、瘀伤、扭伤及外伤等。 【Precautions / 注意事项】 Please avoid applying around ulcers, open cuts, and sensitive skin. 皮肤溃疡、破损或敏感处请勿使用。 【Product Features / 产品特性】 Relieves rheumatic pain, muscle aches, joint pain, bruises, and traumatic injuries. 风湿遍身酸痛，筋骨酸痛，关节痛，跌打损伤。 【Recommended Usage / 使用方法】 External use only. Apply directly to the affected area. For mild discomfort: 1 time daily; for severe pain: 1–3 times daily. 外用。将药膏贴于患处，轻者每日1次，重者每日1-3次。 【Storage / 保存方法】 Store in a cool, dry place. Keep away from direct sunlight. 置于阴凉干燥处，避免阳光直射。 【Packaging / 包装】 10 pieces per pack / 10片 Size: 15cm x 9cm / 尺寸：15cm x 9cm 【Ingredients / 成分】 Clematidis Radix et Rhizoma / 威灵仙 Momordicae Semen / 木鳖子 Ricini Semen / 蓖麻子 Myrrha / 没药 Olibanum / 乳香 Rosin / 松脂 Yellow Wax / 黄蜡 Menthol / 薄荷脑 Zinc Oxide / 氧化锌 Methyl Salicylate / 冬绿油 Indigocarmine / 食用蓝色4号 Tartrazine / 食用黄色2号 Sesame Oil / 麻油
424606874.detail_html:
Dr. Wong Pain Relieving Plaster 膏药贴 (10pcs/Pack)

For Muscle Aches, Knee & Back Pain

【Suitable for / 适用症状】

  • Muscle aches and strains, arthritic aches, bruises, sprains, and traumatic injuries.
  • 肌肉酸痛、关节炎酸痛、瘀伤、扭伤及外伤等。

【Precautions / 注意事项】

  • Please avoid applying around ulcers, open cuts, and sensitive skin.
  • 皮肤溃疡、破损或敏感处请勿使用。

【Product Features / 产品特性】

  • Relieves rheumatic pain, muscle aches, joint pain, bruises, and traumatic injuries.
  • 风湿遍身酸痛，筋骨酸痛，关节痛，跌打损伤。

【Recommended Usage / 使用方法】

  • External use only. Apply directly to the affected area. For mild discomfort: 1 time daily; for severe pain: 1–3 times daily.
  • 外用。将药膏贴于患处，轻者每日1次，重者每日1-3次。

【Storage / 保存方法】

  • Store in a cool, dry place. Keep away from direct sunlight.
  • 置于阴凉干燥处，避免阳光直射。

【Packaging / 包装】

  • 10 pieces per pack / 10片
  • Size: 15cm x 9cm / 尺寸：15cm x 9cm

【Ingredients / 成分】

  • Clematidis Radix et Rhizoma / 威灵仙
  • Momordicae Semen / 木鳖子
  • Ricini Semen / 蓖麻子
  • Myrrha / 没药
  • Olibanum / 乳香
  • Rosin / 松脂
  • Yellow Wax / 黄蜡
  • Menthol / 薄荷脑
  • Zinc Oxide / 氧化锌
  • Methyl Salicylate / 冬绿油
  • Indigocarmine / 食用蓝色4号
  • Tartrazine / 食用黄色2号
  • Sesame Oil / 麻油

product.desc:
Dr. Wong Pain Relieving Plaster 膏药贴 (10pcs/Pack)

For Muscle Aches, Knee & Back Pain

【Suitable for / 适用症状】

  • Muscle aches and strains, arthritic aches, bruises, sprains, and traumatic injuries.
  • 肌肉酸痛、关节炎酸痛、瘀伤、扭伤及外伤等。

【Precautions / 注意事项】

  • Please avoid applying around ulcers, open cuts, and sensitive skin.
  • 皮肤溃疡、破损或敏感处请勿使用。

【Product Features / 产品特性】

  • Relieves rheumatic pain, muscle aches, joint pain, bruises, and traumatic injuries.
  • 风湿遍身酸痛，筋骨酸痛，关节痛，跌打损伤。

【Recommended Usage / 使用方法】

  • External use only. Apply directly to the affected area. For mild discomfort: 1 time daily; for severe pain: 1–3 times daily.
  • 外用。将药膏贴于患处，轻者每日1次，重者每日1-3次。

【Storage / 保存方法】

  • Store in a cool, dry place. Keep away from direct sunlight.
  • 置于阴凉干燥处，避免阳光直射。

【Packaging / 包装】

  • 10 pieces per pack / 10片
  • Size: 15cm x 9cm / 尺寸：15cm x 9cm

【Ingredients / 成分】

  • Clematidis Radix et Rhizoma / 威灵仙
  • Momordicae Semen / 木鳖子
  • Ricini Semen / 蓖麻子
  • Myrrha / 没药
  • Olibanum / 乳香
  • Rosin / 松脂
  • Yellow Wax / 黄蜡
  • Menthol / 薄荷脑
  • Zinc Oxide / 氧化锌
  • Methyl Salicylate / 冬绿油
  • Indigocarmine / 食用蓝色4号
  • Tartrazine / 食用黄色2号
  • Sesame Oil / 麻油

product.desc:
• Product Name: Bunion Corrector
  • Product Quantity: One Pair
  • Suitable for the crowd: the elderly, adults
product.highlights:
• [Realigns the Toes Correctly] This toe straightener can help repair overlapping toes, hammer toes, hallux valgus, crooked toes and other foot problems. It can relieve Bunion and Hallux Valgus pain. By wearing a bunion protector, bunion splint will readjust the toes to their natural position.
  • [Creative Knob Design] Upgraded version of the Strap type orthotic, the knob design can freely adjust the correction angle according to the degree of valgus, and the scale adjustment can accurately adjust the correction angle. At the same time, the bunion toe straightener correction force is stronger, which can also be used for moderate or serious valgus.
  • [One Size Fits Everyone] The bunion corrector can be adjusted to provide a comfortable fit. It is suitable for all sizes and can be used on both male and female feet. Flexible rotation at 180 degrees does not affect daily home corrections.
  • [Professional Material] Made of high-quality materials, the bunion toe straightener can relieve hallux valgus to the greatest extent. The soft and easy-to-clean silicone inner pad can be used repeatedly.
  • [Relax All Day] Wear bunion splint during daily activities or sleeping to prevent toes from bending. The bunion corrector for women and men provides soft cushioning and support, allowing you to feel good throughout the day.

2541929226.title: Tech Love Bunion Corrector + 5 Toes Silicone Separator Big Toe Bone Straightener Hallux Valgus Toe Overlap Separators Toe Corrector Orthopedic Adjuster Bunion Splint Corrector Pain Relief Toes Protector Foot Care Tool
2541929226.detail_text: 【Toe Corrector】 Hallux valgus 3D knob toe corrector, precise adjustment of the degree. Reduce the eversion angle. Freely control the correction angle and experience the valgus from 40 degrees to 0 degrees. 【5 Toe Silicone Separator】 High quality silicone material, high elasticity, soft and comfortable, protect the sole of the foot, easy walking. It can provide better wearing experience while correcting toes. 2082039177.title: HealthTree Digital Hearing Aid Rechargeable Hearing Aids for Elderly Rechargeable Invisible Sound Amplifier for Adult
2082039177.detail_text: Health Tree is a store focus on Health Monitors & Tests, helping you Monitoring your Health. All of our products have Quality Assurances. We have a Professional Team to Design, Manufacture, Quality Control and Customer Service. ✈✈We Shipped by Lazada Logistics and Promise to send the item to Lazada Logistics Center within 24 hours! ✈✈ Following Health Tree, Vouchers Get✔ & Saving more money, Hurry to follow us! If you have any problem or want to know more about us, Please Contact Customer Service without hesitation. Our Professional Customer Service Team will help you as soon as possible.‍‍READY STOCK & 100% BRAND NEW ITEMS Your satisfaction is our biggest driving force. Let's be Healthy! Specification： Output OSPL90 Max: 113dB±3dB Average OSPL90: 108dB±4dB FOG50 MAX Gain: 33dB±5dB Total Harmonic Wave Distortion: ≤1% Frequency Range: 200-6500Hz EQ Input Noise Level: ≦ 15dB±2dB Material: ABS Color: Black / White Hearing Aids Working Time: 15-24hours Hearing Aids Charging Time: 2hours Charging Case Working Time: 70hours Charging Case Charging Time: 2.5-3hours Light Indicator: 1.When the hearing aid is charging, the left/right blue light of the charging case is flashing. 2.The left/right blue light of the charging case is off when the hearing aids had been finished charging. 3.When the charging case is low power, the middle red light flashes. 4.The middle blue light flashes means the charging case is charging. 5.When the charging case finished charging, the middle blue light is on. How to use HealthTree hearing aids for senior: Choose the earmuffs for hearing aids that fit you well, and let the hearing aids fit snugly into your ear holes. Press and hold the touch button of the hearing amplifier for 3 seconds to turn on. Click to change the volume. Each time you turn it on, the previous settings will be used by default. If you don't know how to use it, please feel free to contact us. Professional after-sales support will reply within 24 hours. Notice: 1.Please wear the hearing aid in the ear tightly and let the microphone face upward before turn on the hearing aids. 2.Long press for 3s to turn the sound amplifier on and you will listen to 4 beeps. 3.Click to change volume, total 6 volume positions. 4.Long press for 3s to turn off the hearing aids. Otherwise put it in the charging case ,it will turn off automatically.

product.highlights:
• Enjoy clear sound: Constructed from digital chips for a smart design, HealthTree digital hearing aid with 16 Channels noise cancelling can not miss any piece of sound in order to offer hearing lost with mild and moderate hearing loss a clear conversation. It's the second chance for you to feel the true world around you.
  • Rechargeable hearing Amplifier: Reduce the worry of buying batteries and worry about sudden loss of electricity.The charging case which provides 70 hours of regular usage boosts durability.That the rechargeable hearing aid for a full charge can last up to 15 Hours provide peace of mind.
  • Invisible hearing aids for adults: Mini design for Invisible to other,just like wearing earbuds. This invisible hearing aid is also designed to provide comfort and excellent fit with your ear and offers great benefits to get back to normal life.
  • One-button Operation: Wear the hearing aid in the ear tightly and let the microphone face upward, then press the button for 3 seconds to turn the sound amplifier on.You also can adjust the volume by single clicking the button. One-button Operation secures an exact fit for seniors.
  • Lightweight and Portable: Weight about 3g, compact and portable, ergonomic design, not easy to fall off. 3 sizes earplugs are provided, which can fit all people and very comfortable. The mini design is easy to carry.

page_json.name: HealthTree Digital Hearing Aid Rechargeable Hearing Aids for Elderly Rechargeable Invisible Sound Amplifier for Adult
page_json.description: Health Tree. Phonak Hearing Aid Battery: This hearing aid will not interfere with your hearing, allowing you to enjoy a more peaceful and peaceful life. Hearing Aid with Bluetooth: This hearing aid is equipped with a professional sound-sensitive technology, which can provide you with a clear and natural sound experience. It is a professional hearing aid with bluetooth, you don t have to worry about your hearing any more. Bear Hands Silicone Oven: The heat-resistant silicone oven on the top of the hearing aid device protects your hands from the heat, and it can be stably placed in the desired position to protect your hearing. Hearing Aid for Elderly: Hearing aid for the elderly, children and adults with hearing impairment and sensitivity. Slipsilk Face Covering: The edge of the hearing device is designed with a slipsilk material, which can prevent the user's face from being hurted by the hot sun. It also has a good heat dissipation effect, so that you can enjoy your hearing more comfort

13717722012.title: HADLEY | Smoking Cessation Aid Smoke Alternative Device
13717722012.detail_text: Creative Gift Idea This product serves as a creative gift idea for festivals and special occasions, offering a thoughtful present for friends or family members trying to quit smoking. Innovative Design The innovative design of this product makes it an attractive option for those looking to quit smoking, providing a satisfying experience similar to traditional cigarettes. Gift for Health-conscious Individuals Perfect as a gift for health-conscious individuals, this product promotes a healthier lifestyle and supports smokers in their journey to quit. Authentic Product As an authentic product, users can trust in its quality and effectiveness, ensuring a reliable aid in their efforts to quit smoking. Healthier Alternative This product offers a healthier alternative to smoking, helping smokers quit while reducing harmful effects on their health.
13717722012.detail_html:
Creative Gift Idea

This product serves as a creative gift idea for festivals and special occasions, offering a thoughtful present for friends or family members trying to quit smoking.

Innovative Design

The innovative design of this product makes it an attractive option for those looking to quit smoking, providing a satisfying experience similar to traditional cigarettes.

Gift for Health-conscious Individuals

Perfect as a gift for health-conscious individuals, this product promotes a healthier lifestyle and supports smokers in their journey to quit.

Authentic Product

Healthier Alternative

Authentic Product

As an authentic product, users can trust in its quality and effectiveness, ensuring a reliable aid in their efforts to quit smoking.

Healthier Alternative

page_json.description: Creative Gift IdeaThis product serves as a creative gift idea for festivals and special occasions, offering a thoughtful present for friends or family members trying to quit smoking.Innovative DesignThe innovative design of this product makes it an attractive option for those looking to quit smoking, providing a satisfying experience similar to traditional cigarettes.Gift for Health-conscious IndividualsPerfect as a gift for health-conscious individuals, this product promotes a healthier lifestyle and supports smokers in their journey to quit.Authentic ProductAs an authentic product, users can trust in its quality and effectiveness, ensuring a reliable aid in their efforts to quit smoking.Healthier AlternativeThis product offers a healthier alternative to smoking, helping smokers quit while reducing harmful effects on their health.

3328693109.title: COLMI R10 Smart Ring with Charging Case for Men Women, Health and Sleep Monitor, 5ATM Waterproof, Multi-sport Mode
3328693109.detail_text: COLMI Smart Ring No.1 in sales on AliExpress, and is far ahead. Note: 1. For best performance and accuracy, we recommend wearing the COLMI Ring on your index finger. If you prefer other fingers, the middle and ring fingers are also OK. Avoid using fingers that are narrower than the knuckles at the base. 2. Please measure the circumference of your finger before purchasing, and make sure the rope or paper strip fits snugly against your finger, avoiding being too loose or too tight. (Please use a thinner piece of string or paper strip to measure the size. If the measuring tool is too wide, the measurement will be large.) 3. How to start: Use the included charging case to charge COLMI Ring. The heart rate light will light up to indicate successful startup. Then you can use the APP Qring to connect the COLMI Ring. 3.1. Some models have a protective film on the charging port. Please remove the protective film before charging. 3.2. If you purchased the charging case version, please charge the charging case at the same time when using it for the first time. COLMI Smart Ring - R10 with Charging Case The COLMI R10 Smart Ring is a sleek and stylish wearable that combines health monitoring with modern design. It features 24/7 heart rate tracking, sleep monitoring, and activity tracking, helping you stay on top of your health. With its lightweight, comfortable design and long battery life, the R10 is perfect for everyday wear, offering both functionality and fashion. Wear it worry-free every day, the titanium steel shell, paired with advanced low-temperature potting technology, grants the ring a 5ATM&IP68 water resistance rating. the R10 Smart Ring is not just feather-light but incredibly durable and resistant to wear. COLMI official store Authentic COLMI smart watch are engineered and manufactured with high-quality materials, and they're always quality-tested before they leave our factory. Since counterfeit or fake devices are not built or tested to these standards, they might perform poorly or malfunction. So, we recommend buying devices sold only by our official store. Brand Story COLMI was established in 2012. Slogan: Your first smart watch. Young and simple, but never naive. Mission: Provide cost-effective smart electronics.
3328693109.detail_html:
COLMI Smart Ring

No.1 in sales on AliExpress, and is far ahead.









Note:

1. For best performance and accuracy, we recommend wearing the COLMI Ring on your index finger. If you prefer other fingers, the middle and ring fingers are also OK. Avoid using fingers that are narrower than the knuckles at the base.
2. Please measure the circumference of your finger before purchasing, and make sure the rope or paper strip fits snugly against your finger, avoiding being too loose or too tight. (Please use a thinner piece of string or paper strip to measure the size. If the measuring tool is too wide, the measurement will be large.)
3. How to start: Use the included charging case to charge COLMI Ring. The heart rate light will light up to indicate successful startup. Then you can use the APP Qring to connect the COLMI Ring.
3.1. Some models have a protective film on the charging port. Please remove the protective film before charging.
3.2. If you purchased the charging case version, please charge the charging case at the same time when using it for the first time.


COLMI Smart Ring - R10 with Charging Case

The COLMI R10 Smart Ring is a sleek and stylish wearable that combines health monitoring with modern design. It features 24/7 heart rate tracking, sleep monitoring, and activity tracking, helping you stay on top of your health. With its lightweight, comfortable design and long battery life, the R10 is perfect for everyday wear, offering both functionality and fashion.

Wear it worry-free every day, the titanium steel shell, paired with advanced low-temperature potting technology, grants the ring a 5ATM&IP68 water resistance rating. the R10 Smart Ring is not just feather-light but incredibly durable and resistant to wear.


COLMI official store

Authentic COLMI smart watch are engineered and manufactured with high-quality materials, and they're always quality-tested before they leave our factory.
Since counterfeit or fake devices are not built or tested to these standards, they might perform poorly or malfunction. So, we recommend buying devices sold only by our official store.


Brand Story

COLMI was established in 2012.

Slogan: Your first smart watch.
Young and simple, but never naive.

Mission: Provide cost-effective smart electronics.

aiTexts: This COLMI R10 Smart Ring is designed for health and sleep monitoring, perfect for both men and women.
Features: 5ATM waterproof rating and multi-sport mode for versatile use.
Functionality: Tracks heart rate, sleep patterns, and activity levels to enhance your fitness journey.
Practical Use: Ideal for daily wear, whether at the gym or during sleep, ensuring you stay informed about your health.
Convenience: Comes with a charging case for easy power management.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

brand.name: Colmi
brand.suggestion: More GPS Trackers & Accessories from Colmi

product.desc:
COLMI Smart Ring

No.1 in sales on AliExpress, and is far ahead.









Note:

1. For best performance and accuracy, we recommend wearing the COLMI Ring on your index finger. If you prefer other fingers, the middle and ring fingers are also OK. Avoid using fingers that are narrower than the knuckles at the base.
2. Please measure the circumference of your finger before purchasing, and make sure the rope or paper strip fits snugly against your finger, avoiding being too loose or too tight. (Please use a thinner piece of string or paper strip to measure the size. If the measuring tool is too wide, the measurement will be large.)
3. How to start: Use the included charging case to charge COLMI Ring. The heart rate light will light up to indicate successful startup. Then you can use the APP Qring to connect the COLMI Ring.
3.1. Some models have a protective film on the charging port. Please remove the protective film before charging.
3.2. If you purchased the charging case version, please charge the charging case at the same time when using it for the first time.


COLMI Smart Ring - R10 with Charging Case

The COLMI R10 Smart Ring is a sleek and stylish wearable that combines health monitoring with modern design. It features 24/7 heart rate tracking, sleep monitoring, and activity tracking, helping you stay on top of your health. With its lightweight, comfortable design and long battery life, the R10 is perfect for everyday wear, offering both functionality and fashion.

Wear it worry-free every day, the titanium steel shell, paired with advanced low-temperature potting technology, grants the ring a 5ATM&IP68 water resistance rating. the R10 Smart Ring is not just feather-light but incredibly durable and resistant to wear.


COLMI official store

Authentic COLMI smart watch are engineered and manufactured with high-quality materials, and they're always quality-tested before they leave our factory.
Since counterfeit or fake devices are not built or tested to these standards, they might perform poorly or malfunction. So, we recommend buying devices sold only by our official store.


Brand Story

COLMI was established in 2012.

Slogan: Your first smart watch.
Young and simple, but never naive.

Mission: Provide cost-effective smart electronics.
